creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 219008
shar with new port

Perl interface to the Argon2 key derivation functions
https://metacpan.org/release/Crypt-Argon2

- This port is needed as a new dependency for existing port 
security/p5-openxpki-3.8+

- "portlint -ACN" says: looks fine.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p10 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.32.0
pkg 1.15.10
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
